MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-11-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANTS LYFT, INC.'S AND SELIS ENRIQUE DAVILA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY JONATHAN HARRIMAN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS AND LYNN KRIEGER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF DEFENDANTS MOVING PAPERS AND REQUIRED DEFENDANTS COUNSEL TO PAY A $60 CONTINUANCE FEE VIA E-FILING (IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION) FOR FAILURE TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.7B. ARGUED AND THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL CONDITIONAL ON THE PAYMENT OF THE $60 MOTION CONTINUANCE FILING FEE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 02/16/21 IS CONTINUED TO 05/17/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY PER WRITTEN ORDER, SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MS. KRIEGER TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
